title: Marathon Digital Holdings Announces Bitcoin Production and Mining Operation Updates for May 2024
text: Marathon Digital raised its average operational hash rate during May 2024 to 25.7 EH/s, a 22% improvement over April. The strength of Marathon's MARA pool was evident in May with a noteworthy 32% increase in the number of blocks won compared to April, growing from 129 blocks to 170. As of May 31, 2024 the company held a total of 17,857 unrestricted BTC. During May, the combined balance of unrestricted cash and cash equivalents and bitcoin increased from $1,214.1 million to $1,495.2 million. This demonstrates the company's strong operational performance and cash generation during the spring of 2024.
